data.ordering: core (the protected asset) outward to the outermost defense

layers.name: Data
layers.note: Encryption at rest, tokenization, least-privilege access

layers.name: Host
layers.note: Hardened OS, endpoint protection, timely patching

layers.name: Perimeter
layers.note: Edge firewall, DDoS protection, VPN gateways

layers.name: Physical & People
layers.note: Facility access control, security training, governance
